sub_a.model: MAGMA_Z ~ in_set + log10(gene_length) + lof_pLI + log10(exp_lof+1) + log10(NSNPS+1)

aggregate_pattern.reason: SCZ ROBUST + >=2 psych partners ['mdd', 'asd'] + 0 NCs robust

reconstruction_check.note: Exact match not expected when we use subset of coefs; high ρ confirms linear-model sum is the right mechanism.

decision.decision_rule: CI-based: observed bootstrap CI disjoint from MC-null CI AND observed > null median (v2.1 FIX #3, no scalar p-value)

bh_fdr_family.note: v2.1 FIX #3: 3 B.2 tests dropped from BH family (CI-based, not p-based). Family is 4 B.1 + 1 B.3 = 5 tests.

permutation_null_category_counts_deviati.implemented_as: category counts preserved within loaded coefs∩munged subset; design-deviation from brief_v2 L133 due to restriction to features with non-zero ridge β

sub_b_decision_rule_changes_v2_1.fix_1_other_gate: other-mass gate evaluated on LOADED subset via BOTH fraction AND weighted metrics; fires if either > 0.15
sub_b_decision_rule_changes_v2_1.fix_2_permutation_counts: category counts preserved within loaded coefs∩munged subset (see permutation_null_category_counts_deviation)
sub_b_decision_rule_changes_v2_1.fix_3_b2_ci_based: B.2 decision is CI-disjointness vs MC-null CI at tail-N; no scalar p-value; 3 B.2 tests removed from BH family
sub_b_decision_rule_changes_v2_1.fix_6_reconstruction_halt: reconstruction ρ(X@β, PoPS_preds) >= 0.99 enforced in non-smoke runs
sub_b_decision_rule_changes_v2_1.fix_8_ls_mc_n: LS-MC point-anchor n raised to 100000 (was 10,000) for ±0.0016 precision
